moves.name: Crunch
moves.effect: The user crunches up the target with sharp fangs. It may also lower the target's Defense stat.

moves.name: Volt Switch
moves.effect: After making its attack, the user rushes back to switch places with a party Pokémon in waiting.

moves.name: Wild Charge
moves.effect: The user shrouds itself in electricity and smashes into its target. It also lowers the user's Defense stat.

moves.name: Snarl
moves.effect: The user yells as if it is ranting about something, making the targets' Sp. Atk stat decrease.

moves.name: Shell Smash
moves.effect: The user breaks its shell, lowering its Defense and Sp. Def stats but sharply raising Attack, Sp. Atk, and Speed stats.

moves.name: Flamethrower
moves.effect: The target is scorched with an intense blast of fire. It may also leave the target with a burn.

moves.name: Diamond Storm
moves.effect: The user whips up a storm of diamonds to damage opposing Pokémon. It may also reduce the targets' Sp. Def stat.

moves.name: SolarBeam
moves.effect: A two-turn attack. The user gathers light, then blasts a bundled beam on the second turn.

moves.name: Stone Edge
moves.effect: The user stabs the foe with sharpened stones from below. It has a high critical-hit ratio.

moves.name: Crunch
moves.effect: The user crunches up the target with sharp fangs. It may also lower the target's Defense stat.

moves.name: Dragon Tail
moves.effect: The target is knocked away and switched. In the wild, a battle against a single Pokémon ends.

moves.name: Stealth Rock
moves.effect: The user lays a trap of levitating stones around the opponent's team. The trap hurts opponents that switch into battle.

moves.name: Eruption
moves.effect: The user attacks the opposing team with explosive fury. The lower the user's HP, the less powerful this attack becomes.

moves.name: ExtremeSpeed
moves.effect: The user charges the target at blinding speed. This attack always goes before any other move.

moves.name: Earth Power
moves.effect: The user makes the ground under the target erupt with power. It may also lower the target's Sp. Def.

moves.name: SolarBeam
moves.effect: A two-turn attack. The user gathers light, then blasts a bundled beam on the second turn.

moves.name: Night Slash
moves.effect: The user slashes the target the instant an opportunity arises. Critical hits land more easily.

moves.name: X-Scissor
moves.effect: The user slashes at the target by crossing its scythes or claws as if they were a pair of scissors.

moves.name: Iron Head
moves.effect: The user slams the target with its steel-hard head. It may also make the target flinch.

moves.name: Iron Defense
moves.effect: The user hardens its body's surface like iron, sharply raising its Defense stat.

moves.name: Sunny Day
moves.effect: The user intensifies the sun for five turns, powering up Fire-type moves.

moves.name: Fire Blast
moves.effect: The target is attacked with an intense blast of all-consuming fire. It may also leave the target with a burn.

moves.name: Dark Pulse
moves.effect: The user releases a horrible aura imbued with dark thoughts. It may also make the target flinch.

moves.name: SolarBeam
moves.effect: A two-turn attack. The user gathers light, then blasts a bundled beam on the second turn.

moves.name: Hurricane
moves.effect: The user attacks by wrapping its opponent in a fierce wind that flies up into the sky. It may also confuse the target.

moves.name: Focus Blast
moves.effect: The user heightens its mental focus and unleashes its power. It may also lower the target's Sp. Def.

moves.name: Blizzard
moves.effect: A howling blizzard is summoned to strike the opposing team. It may also freeze them solid.

moves.name: Volt Switch
moves.effect: After making its attack, the user rushes back to switch places with a party Pokémon in waiting.

moves.name: Moonblast
moves.effect: The user attacks the target with the power of the moon. It may also lower the target's Sp. Atk stat.

moves.name: Follow Me
moves.effect: The user draws attention to itself, making all targets take aim only at the user.

moves.name: Encore
moves.effect: The user compels the target to keep using only the move it last used for three turns.

moves.name: Sing
moves.effect: A soothing lullaby is sung in a calming voice that puts the target into a deep slumber.

moves.name: After You
moves.effect: The user helps the target and makes it use its move right after the user.

moves.name: Thunder Wave
moves.effect: A weak electric charge is launched at the target. It causes paralysis if it hits.

moves.name: DazzlingGleam
moves.effect: The user damages the target by emitting a powerful flash of light.

moves.name: Heat Wave
moves.effect: The user attacks by exhaling hot breath on the opposing team. It may also leave targets with a burn.

moves.name: Psyshock
moves.effect: The user materializes an odd psychic wave to attack the target. This attack does physical damage.

moves.name: Meditate
moves.effect: The user meditates to awaken the power deep within its body and raise its Sp. Atk and accuracy stats.

moves.name: Focus Blast
moves.effect: The user heightens its mental focus and unleashes its power. It may also lower the target's Sp. Def.

moves.name: Recover
moves.effect: Restoring its own cells, the user restores its own HP by half of its max HP.

moves.name: Fire Blast
moves.effect: The target is attacked with an intense blast of all-consuming fire. It may also leave the target with a burn.

moves.name: Zen Headbutt
moves.effect: The user focuses its willpower to its head and attacks the target. It may also make the target flinch.

moves.name: Megahorn
moves.effect: Using its tough and impressive horn, the user rams into the target with no letup.

moves.name: Ally Switch
moves.effect: The user teleports using a strange power and switches its place with one of its allies.

moves.name: Psychic
moves.effect: The target is hit by a strong telekinetic force. It may also reduce the target's Sp. Def stat.

moves.name: Moonblast
moves.effect: The user attacks the target with the power of the moon. It may also lower the target's Sp. Atk stat.

moves.name: Grass Knot
moves.effect: The user snares the target with grass and trips it. The heavier the target, the greater the damage.

moves.name: Calm Mind
moves.effect: The user quietly focuses its mind and calms its spirit to raise its Sp. Atk and Sp. Def stats.

moves.name: Knock Off
moves.effect: The user slaps down the target's held item, preventing that item from being used in the battle.

moves.name: Rock Slide
moves.effect: Large boulders are hurled at the opposing team to inflict damage. It may also make the targets flinch.

moves.name: Fake Out
moves.effect: An attack that hits first and makes the target flinch. It only works the first turn the user is in battle.

moves.name: Close Combat
moves.effect: The user fights the target up close without guarding itself. It also cuts the user's Defense and Sp. Def.

moves.name: Spore
moves.effect: The user scatters bursts of spores that induce sleep.

moves.name: Focus Punch
moves.effect: The user focuses its mind before launching a punch. It will fail if the user is hit before it is used.

moves.name: Seed Bomb
moves.effect: The user slams a barrage of hard-shelled seeds down on the target from above.

moves.name: Mach Punch
moves.effect: The user throws a punch at blinding speed. It is certain to strike first.

moves.name: U-turn
moves.effect: After making its attack, the user rushes back to switch places with a party Pokémon in waiting.

moves.name: Bullet Punch
moves.effect: The user strikes the target with tough punches as fast as bullets. This move always goes first.

moves.name: Sacred Sword
moves.effect: The user attacks by slicing with its long horns. The target's stat changes don't affect this attack's damage.

moves.name: Swords Dance
moves.effect: A frenetic dance to uplift the fighting spirit. It sharply raises the user's Attack stat.

moves.name: Drain Punch
moves.effect: An energy-draining punch. The user's HP is restored by half the damage taken by the target.

moves.name: Bulk Up
moves.effect: The user tenses its muscles to bulk up its body, boosting both its Attack and Defense stats.

moves.name: Rock Slide
moves.effect: Large boulders are hurled at the opposing team to inflict damage. It may also make the targets flinch.

moves.name: HighHorsepower
moves.effect: The user overwhelms the target with the force of its entire body.

moves.name: Double-Edge
moves.effect: A reckless, life-risking tackle. It also damages the user by a fairly large amount, however.

moves.name: Head Smash
moves.effect: The user attacks the target with a hazardous, full-power headbutt. The user also takes terrible damage.

moves.name: HighHorsepower
moves.effect: The user overwhelms the target with the force of its entire body.

moves.name: Shining Shield
moves.effect: The user fashions the metal on its body to protect itself or an ally, raising their Defense and Sp. Def stats.

moves.name: ExtremeSpeed
moves.effect: The user charges the target at blinding speed. This attack always goes before any other move.

moves.name: Close Combat
moves.effect: The user fights the target up close without guarding itself. It also cuts the user's Defense and Sp. Def.

moves.name: Flash Cannon
moves.effect: The user gathers all its light energy and releases it at once. It may also lower the target's Sp. Def stat.

moves.name: Blaze Kick
moves.effect: The user launches a burning kick that may raise its Attack stat.

moves.name: Stealth Rock
moves.effect: The user lays a trap of levitating stones around the opponent's team. The trap hurts opponents that switch into battle.

moves.name: U-turn
moves.effect: After making its attack, the user rushes back to switch places with a party Pokémon in waiting.

moves.name: Acrobatics
moves.effect: The user nimbly strikes the target. If the user is not holding an item, this attack inflicts massive damage.

moves.name: Stone Edge
moves.effect: The user stabs the foe with sharpened stones from below. It has a high critical-hit ratio.

moves.name: Overheat
moves.effect: The user attacks the target at full power. The attack's recoil harshly reduces the user's Sp. Atk stat.

moves.name: ExtremeSpeed
moves.effect: The user charges the target at blinding speed. This attack always goes before any other move.

moves.name: Will-O-Wisp
moves.effect: The user shoots a sinister, bluish-white flame at the target to inflict a burn.

moves.name: SmokeScreen
moves.effect: The user releases an obscuring cloud of smoke or ink before retreating. It also reduces the target's accuracy.

moves.name: Draining Kiss
moves.effect: The user steals the target's HP with a kiss. The user's HP is restored by 75% of the damage dealt to the target.

moves.name: Scald
moves.effect: The user shoots boiling hot water at its target. It may also leave the target with a burn.

moves.name: Dragon Tail
moves.effect: The target is knocked away and switched. In the wild, a battle against a single Pokémon ends.

moves.name: Light Screen
moves.effect: A wondrous wall of light is put up to suppress damage from special attacks for five turns.

moves.name: Drill Run
moves.effect: The user crashes into its target while rotating its body like a drill. Critical hits land more easily.

moves.name: Vicious Slash
moves.effect: The user slashes at the target three times. Critical hits land more easily.

moves.name: Leaf Blade
moves.effect: The user handles a sharp leaf like a sword and attacks by cutting its target. Critical hits land more easily.

moves.name: Focus Energy
moves.effect: The user takes a deep breath and focuses so that critical hits land more easily.

moves.name: Quiver Dance
moves.effect: The user lightly performs a beautiful, mystic dance. It boosts the user's Sp. Atk, Sp. Def, and Speed stats.

moves.name: Fiery Dance
moves.effect: Cloaked in flames, the user dances and flaps its wings. It may also raise the user's Sp. Atk stat.

moves.name: Giga Drain
moves.effect: A nutrient-draining attack. The user's HP is restored by half the damage taken by the target.

moves.name: Hurricane
moves.effect: The user attacks by wrapping its opponent in a fierce wind that flies up into the sky. It may also confuse the target.

moves.name: Earthquake
moves.effect: The user sets off an earthquake that strikes those around it.

moves.name: Iron Tail
moves.effect: The target is slammed with a steel-hard tail. It may also lower the target's Defense stat.

moves.name: Outrage
moves.effect: The user rampages and attacks for two to three turns. It then becomes confused, however.

moves.name: Dragon Dance
moves.effect: The user vigorously performs a mystic, powerful dance that boosts its Attack and Speed stats.
